ksa_text: Skill in producing data quality reporting for business and governance audiences, translating technical quality metrics into business risk and operational impact language.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Included: skill maps directly to core Data Engineer scope — DE-specific signals detected ("data quality", "quality metric"). STRM composite score is strong (0.4564, top tier for this dataset); note that framework scores routinely underweight technical execution KSAs for this role, so text-based signal carries primary weight. Seniority is appropriate for IC-to-senior-IC: the KSA describes technical practice, not organizational strategy.
